software development experts.
We help you achieve your goals
To create flexible custom made solutions, we bring a well- established team of top-tier talent to the table.
Growing the Value ﻿via Customer Intimacy
Creating close bonds and enduring partnerships with our customers are key to our approach.  We are not afraid to go the extra mile to achieve even better results for you.
Expertise in Highly Competitive Fields
We specialize in high-tech and smart industries, navigating them with ease. Our repertoire includes cutting-edge software solutions tailor made to your needs.
Strong Culture with Collective Knowledge
We use the combined knowledge of the whole company to deliver exceptional outcomes. Happy to share the know-how you've been missing on your innovative projects with you.
More about us
What our customers say
"Our collaboration with Roboauto is invaluable to us. Their external experts provide top-notch support, significantly contributing to the success of our projects. They bring deep expertise and extensive experience, which are crucial for us. We greatly appreciate their professionalism, reliability, and ability to handle complex tasks efficiently. We are confident that their contributions will continue to be crucial to our future successes."
Petr Hertl
Senior Manager at Thermo Fisher Scientific
"The Roboauto team brought not only experience with modern technologies, but also new development methods, and a proactive approach and communication. Working with this company has made our product more powerful, more stable and our response to market demands faster."
Petr Kellner
Chief Commercial Officer at Abbas
"We've been working with Roboauto from almost the very beginning. Together we have worked on a number of research projects and dealt with a number of challenges. Their approach is proactive. They are always looking for ways to deliver the solution they promised, but also go the extra mile."
Veronika Valentová
Director of R&D and Knowledge Transfer at CDV
"Working with Roboauto has been an exceptional experience for us. Their expertise in developing teleoperation software, combined with their collaborative and friendly approach, has made them an invaluable partner. Together, we’ve successfully integrated their teleoperation technology into our vehicle systems and customer vehicles, creating seamless solutions."
Rakshith Kusumakar
Chief Technology Officer

about.text:
About us – Roboauto
Contact us
How it all started?
small team, big ideas
In 2007, in the Czech-based software development company called
Artin
, a few people started to play with robots after work. They were so successful that they even won robotics competitions. After several years, this club grew so much that it became independent and in
November 2017
a spin-off with the name
Roboauto
was founded.
From the beginning, Roboauto focused on the
development and integration of technologies that are innovative
and still very progressive. These technologies are offered to
various industries
such as mining, logistics, agriculture, aerospace, shipping, and others.
How it's going?
tomorrow's technologies together
Some things have stayed the same, but many have changed. We began with autonomous vehicles, but today, we do so much more!
specialize in software development for any hardware
, with expertise in
C++
Python
, and
Our software runs on up to 20 different types of hardware across 9 industries, including RC models, cars, minibuses, delivery bots, trains, loaders, mining machines, security systems, semiconductors, and even microscopes. We’re passionate to work together on technologies that are shaping the future.
„I like that
our work pushes the boundaries of what’s known
and what people think is possible.
I really enjoy this because it
attracts certain types of companies and people
—those who are usually
interesting, curious, and genius-level smart
. I find that our interactions are very open and our collaborations produce extraordinary results.“
Jakub Jůza,
CEO
great people and growing.
senior developers in C++ and Python.
years together.
our strengths
Customer Intimacy
Diving deep into our customers' industries, we go above and beyond to achieve outstanding results - on time and on budget.
Expertise
We have many years of experience developing custom software solutions for highly competitive high-tech industries.
Flexibility
We can quickly adapt our software to match any need, building on existing solutions without wasting time.
Future Technologies
We're confident working with future technologies turning today's challenges into tomorrow's solutions.
